category_results.category_description: Whether you’re an active individual or training for an elite event, our performance products are tailored to meet your needs. Our Herbalife24® brand is Informed-Sport certified* further ensuring our products’ quality and suitability for athletes. *Tested for banned substances - This product is certified with Informed-Sport. The Informed-Sport programme provides assurance that products have been tested for a wide range of substances prohibited in sport. Every batch of this product is tested for banned substances under the Informed-Sport programme. For more information please visit www.informed-sport.com.

category_results.category_description: Nourish your skin from within, with an expertly formulated collagen drink that's backed by science.
category_results.seo_meta_description: Nourish your skin from within, with an expertly formulated collagen drink that's backed by science.

category_results.category_description:
Unlock the power of age-honoured ingredients.

Inspired by Ayurveda, vritilife® Ayurvedic nutrition offers a range of outer nutrition products designed to achieve clean, soft, supple and nourished skin. Ayurveda as an ancient science of life has a long history, and its basic principles are valid even today. The vritilife products are based on Ayurvedic principles and contain authentic Ayurvedic herbs, for their specific health benefits as mentioned in ancient Ayurvedic texts. The vritilife® range is a perfect amalgamation of Ayurvedic principles and modern science. Carrying the goodness of Ayurveda, these products are crafted by Ayurvedic and modern scientific experts and contain both classical Ayurveda ingredients, formulations and researched ingredients which are sourced with precision to maintain quality. vritilife® skin care range includes: Facial Cleanser, Facial Toner, Facial Serum and Moisturizer.
category_results.seo_meta_description: Achieve clean, soft, supple and nourished skin with vritilife® skin care products, inspired by Ayurveda - an ancient science using age-honoured ingredients.
